title: Govinda Govinda Lyrics Engeyum Eppodhum Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Govinda Govinda
Singers: Vijay Prakash, Ranina, Boni
Lyrics : Na Muthukumar 
Music Director : Sathya C
Movie: Engeyum Eppodhum

Govinda, Govinda, Chennai-la pudhu ponnu
Sirikura, moraikira, aayirathil iva onnu
Edhuku vandhaalo,Immisa thandhaalo

Govinda, Govinda, Chennai-la pudhu ponnu
Sirikura, moraikira, aayirathil iva onnu
Daddy mummy enna peru ivaluku vachaanga
Ada enna keta kodachalunnu pera vappenga

Konjam kooda nambikai illa, Kooda vandhu ottikita tholla
Kalati vidavum manase illa, Enna kodumayada
Kaanji poana molaga ulla, Kotti kedakuthu vedhaya pola
Kaaramaga vedicha ulla, Paava nelamayada

Aagaayam mele thaan, Azhagaana megangal
Annaandu paarke neram indri povadhu engeyo..oh
Veyilodu mazhayum thaan
Ondru sernthu vandhadhu pol
Indha konjaneram payanam sendru mudivadhu ingeyo

Ada-da-da Daddy mummy enna peru ivanuku vachaanga
Enna enna enna keta summa thaanginu peru vappenga

Kappal vaanga vandhirupaalo
Chappel vaanga vandhirupaalo
Usura vaanga vandhirupaalo, onnum puriyalaye
Tailer pola mudinjidu vaalo
Train-a pola neendidu vaalo
Eppa ivana iva viduvaalo, onnum theriyalaye

Appaavi polathaan,thappaaga nenchane
500 kelvi kettu kettu aala kolraale

Iva iva vandha podhu vandha kovam ippo illayada
Ival serthu vaitha sandhegangal 
202-tum times times

Sagresa sa sa sari ga ma ne..
Sagresa sa sa sari ga ma ne ..Govinda ...

Govinda, Govinda, Chennai-la pudhu ponnu
Sirikura, moraikira, aayirathil iva onnu

Govinda ..Govinda ..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Govinda Govinda'?

The song 'Govinda Govinda' celebrates the joy and excitement of life, particularly in the context of youthful romance and fun.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Engeyum Eppodhum'?

'Engeyum Eppodhum' revolves around the intertwining lives of several characters and their experiences, highlighting themes of love and fate.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Boni, Ranina Reddy, and Vijay Prakash.

Who composed the music for 'Govinda Govinda'?

The music for 'Govinda Govinda' was composed by Sathya C, known for his catchy and engaging tunes.

When was 'Govinda Govinda' released?

'Govinda Govinda' was released on August 4, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Govinda Govinda', the lively atmosphere of Chennai is captured through vibrant lyrics and upbeat music. The song conveys a sense of joy and celebration, reflecting the carefree spirit of youth. It evokes feelings of happiness and excitement, making it perfect for festive occasions. The collaboration of talented singers and the catchy composition ensures that this track remains a favorite for parties and celebrations.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Govinda Govinda from Engeyum Eppodhum is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, featuring an electrifying collaboration between singers Boni, Ranina Reddy, and Vijay Prakash. The infectious beats crafted by music director Sathya C perfectly complement the lively lyrics by Na Muthukumar, making it a must-listen for anyone looking to uplift their spirits.
stanzaMeanings: Govinda, Govinda, a new girl in Chennai is smiling and playing, why did she come here, did she come to give us trouble?
Govinda, Govinda, a new girl in Chennai is smiling and playing, what did her parents name her? Why is she asking for a name?
It's all the same, it's all the same.
There is no trust at all, they come and just mess things up. There is no peace of mind, what a hardship it is! Like a chili in the porridge, it burns like fire, it's a painful situation.
The sky is above, beautiful clouds. It seems like time is not going anywhere. Oh, like rain with the sun, this little journey is coming to an end here.
Oh no, what name did they give him? Why is he asking so many questions?

Did the ship come to pick us up? Did the slippers come to pick us up? Did the breath come to pick us up? I don't understand anything. Will it end like a trailer? Will it end like a train? I don't know when he will leave her.
Like a sinner, my heart is wrong, asking 500 questions and getting confused.
When she comes, there is no anger now. The doubts that she brought are now multiplied 202 times.
Singing sa sa sa, it's all good.. Singing sa sa sa, it's all good.. Govinda ...
Govinda, Govinda, a new girl in Chennai is smiling and playing, why did she come here?
Govinda .. Govinda .. Engeyum Eppodhum Lyrics Govinda Govinda by Vijay Prakash, Ranina, Boni Un Pere Theriyadhu by - Madhushree Uyir Arundhadhey by Sayonara Chotta Chotta by Chinmayi
